title: CryptoAnomalyClassification
description: LLM classification verdict for a single anomaly episode. Loaded by crypto_analyser.llm_client.LLMClient._load_schema and enforced via OpenAI-compatible structured output with strict=true.

event_reference.description: Correlation key supplied by classifier caller and echoed by LLM.

classification.description: Primary explanation for anomaly under supplied context.

confidence.description: LLM-reported confidence that classification is supported by supplied context; not predictive probability.

reasons.description: One to three concise reader-facing verdict reasons. Funding rates, OI changes, and thresholds use percentage notation.

supporting_refs.description: Prompt-provided source refs that affirmatively support verdict. Rejected or merely relevant context is omitted.

rationale.description: Detailed audit justification citing supplied feature values and retrieved context. Ragas Faithfulness evaluates combined-context output.
